description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms that extend upward and outward in a dramatic V-shape. The person has a slim build and is dressed in a sleeveless top and straight-cut pants, with visible shoes. The head is proportionate to the body, and the facial features are simplified, giving a cartoon-like appearance. The arms are the most striking feature, being much longer than typical human proportions and appearing to be rigidly extended. The overall posture is upright, and the figure appears to be standing still, with both feet flat on the ground.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with extremely elongated, upward-stretching arms, wearing a sleeveless top and pants, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, and both arms dramatically extended upward and outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the straight posture, and the full length of the left arm extending upward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the sleeveless top, and both arms crossing behind the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, the straight posture, and the full length of the right arm extending upward.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended upward
